summary: Phase 5 Testing Complete: InlineHelp expansion to 4 HR pages + BrandMixDonut Recharts migration. All HR pages load successfully with InlineHelp icons visible. BrandMixDonut code correctly migrated to Recharts (verified via code review). Visual verification of BrandMixDonut incomplete due to executive dashboard navigation issue.

integration_issues.issue: Executive user (executive@torado.id) redirects to Owner Home instead of Executive Dashboard at /executive route
integration_issues.impact: Could not visually verify BrandMixDonut component in ExecutiveHome dashboard
integration_issues.note: This may be by design if executive users have owner-level access. BrandMixDonut is correctly implemented in code (verified) but visual testing incomplete.

passed_tests: PayrollListPkg - InlineHelp icons visible next to Payroll Cycles and Salary Master tabs (code: lines 103-104)
CompensationHub - InlineHelp icon visible in header (code: line 54)
JobApplications - InlineHelp icon visible in page header (code: line 159)
JobApplications - InlineHelp icon in Status Update section (code: line 363)
IncentiveList - InlineHelp icons visible next to Runs and Schemes tabs (code: lines 94-95)
InlineHelp registry contains all 7 new entries (hr-payroll-cycles, hr-salary-master, hr-compensation-hub, hr-job-applications, hr-job-application-status, hr-incentive-schemes, hr-incentive-runs)
BrandMixDonut.jsx successfully migrated from custom SVG to Recharts PieChart (code review verified)
BrandMixDonut uses Recharts components: PieChart, Pie, Cell, ResponsiveContainer, Tooltip
BrandMixDonut hover interactions implemented (opacity changes, center label updates)
BrandMixDonut tooltip displays brand name, revenue, and share percentage
BrandMixDonut legend buttons with hover & click handlers
BrandMixDonut integrated in ExecutiveHome dashboard (code: lines 319-334)
All HR pages load without console errors
test_report_links: Screenshots: .screenshots/payroll-cycles-tab.png, payroll-salary-master-tab.png, compensation-hub.png, job-applications.png, incentive-runs-tab.png, incentive-schemes-tab.png

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (17/18 tests passed, 1 incomplete due to navigation issue)

critical: CREDENTIAL MISMATCH: hr@torado.id user specified in review_request does not exist in /app/memory/test_credentials.md. Used admin@torado.id for testing instead. Please either: (1) Create hr@torado.id user, or (2) Update review_request to use admin@torado.id for HR testing.
medium: Executive Dashboard Navigation: Verify if executive@torado.id should redirect to Owner Home or Executive Dashboard at /executive route. If Executive Dashboard should be accessible, fix routing. If Owner Home is correct, update documentation.

BrandMixDonut Visual Verification: Once executive dashboard navigation is fixed, manually verify BrandMixDonut renders correctly with Recharts, hover interactions work, tooltips display, and click drilldown functions properly.
low: InlineHelp Popover Testing: Manually click InlineHelp icons on all 4 HR pages to verify popovers open with correct content (hr-payroll-cycles, hr-salary-master, hr-compensation-hub, hr-job-applications, hr-job-application-status, hr-incentive-schemes, hr-incentive-runs).

phase_5a_inline_help.details: All 4 HR pages successfully load with InlineHelp icons visible in screenshots. Code review confirms correct implementation with proper data-testid attributes and registry entries.

inline_help_locations: In header next to 'Compensation & Benefits' title (id: hr-compensation-hub)
In page header next to 'Lamaran Kerja' title (id: hr-job-applications)
In Status Update section of detail dialog (id: hr-job-application-status)
pages_tested.status: ✅ Icon visible in screenshot (detail dialog not tested - no applications present)

phase_5b_brand_mix_donut.details: BrandMixDonut.jsx successfully migrated from custom SVG to Recharts PieChart. All required features implemented correctly in code. Visual verification incomplete due to executive dashboard navigation issue.

code_review_findings.recharts_migration: ✅ Uses Recharts PieChart, Pie, Cell, ResponsiveContainer, Tooltip components
code_review_findings.hover_interactions: ✅ Opacity changes on hover (line 61), center label updates (lines 88-98)
code_review_findings.click_drilldown: ✅ onClick handler calls onSliceClick with brand_id (line 55)
code_review_findings.tooltip: ✅ Custom tooltip with brand name, revenue (fmtRp), share percentage (lines 67-85)
code_review_findings.legend: ✅ Legend buttons with hover & click handlers (lines 100-123)
code_review_findings.data_testids: ✅ Proper data-testid attributes: brand-mix-donut, donut-slice-{brand_id}, donut-legend-{brand_id}

visual_verification.reason: Executive user redirects to Owner Home instead of Executive Dashboard
